why_now: Source-link transition diagnostics are default-off and smoke-tested.
The local bucket scorer can consume the new summary/aggregate shape, validate aggregate parity, rank immediate-pair and residual source buckets, and refuse summary-only removal.
Prior fill-to-balance, portfolio-ledger, and dynamic-risk lines all failed because historical candidate-pipeline positives could not be compared to live/no-order transition source links.
A future no-order run with source-link diagnostics is needed only to collect same-window attribution fields, not to support promotion.
why_not_more_local_first: Allowed local candidate_base/candidate_registry does not include the 2026-05-20 or future live/no-order same-window source stream.
The missing evidence is per-candidate live transition linkage, which the new default-off summary fields are designed to expose without pulling events JSONL.
The scorer already defines local field/parity/summary-removal guardrails for consuming those fields after pullback.

selected_diagnostic_question.label: late_repair90_source_link_transition_tail_attribution
selected_diagnostic_question.question: In a fresh live/no-order diagnostic window, are residual cost and pair-tail costs caused by a narrow admitted transition bucket by side, offset, risk direction, or pre-seed ledger state, or are they broad/inherent across admitted late_repair90 transitions?
non_goals: not a promotion or canary run
not a repeat acceptance test of frozen late-repair-only90
not a public/source price cap revival
not a summary-only condition removal search

file_copy_policy: copy only current tools/xuan_dplus_passive_passive_shadow_runner.py into the isolated xuan_research run dir

bounded_preflight_requirements: check df and df -i for root disk/inode capacity
check ps/pgrep for xuan_dplus_passive_passive_shadow_runner.py and ignore the command shell itself
confirm no active overlapping xuan-research runner
confirm shared-ingress broker_manifest.json, market.sock, chainlink.sock, and local_price.sock are present and fresh enough
treat non-xuan-research read-only runners as context only unless resource/transport/no-order safety risk is present

required_outputs: source-link scorer output on pulled summaries/aggregate
standard audit/acceptance if aggregate supports it
explicit explanation of whether residual and pair-tail costs are narrow or broad
keep_criteria: sample is useful enough for attribution, preferably candidates >= 100 or a clear reason if thinner
source-link scorer identifies a bounded admitted transition bucket with high residual_cost_share or pair-tail contribution and low immediate_pair_qty_share
the candidate follow-up is a non-price inventory-path mechanism and not summary-only removal
unknown_criteria: sample is too thin for source-link attribution
required source-link fields are absent or aggregate parity fails
buckets are present but insufficient to distinguish repair/underweight from risk-increasing paths
discard_criteria: residual and pair-tail risk are broad across admitted source buckets
only after-the-fact condition/summary removal would improve metrics
diagnostics imply only frozen mechanisms such as fill-to-balance90, source/public price caps, static target/cap sweeps, cooldown/admission caps, or dynamic risk-state gate as previously tested

research_ranking.label: KEEP_SOURCE_LINK_DIAGNOSTIC_SHADOW_PLAN_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: The source-link scorer and diagnostics are ready enough to queue one future diagnostic-only no-order shadow after bounded preflight. This is a data-attribution plan, not economic strategy evidence.

hard_blockers: no fresh no-order source-link diagnostic summary yet
prior fill-to-balance and portfolio-ledger shadows failed promotion risk budget
dynamic condition-ledger risk-state gate remains mixed
final source-of-truth replay validation remains separate

next_executable_action: Run bounded EC2 preflight only; if clear, start exactly one diagnostic-only no-order source-link transition shadow with PM_DRY_RUN=true and pull back only manifest/aggregate/summary/stdout/stderr/runner.pid/sanity small files, never events JSONL.
